title: Split out low-risk handoff preflight wording from supervisor-boundary proposal
summary: supervisor 境界変更を含めず、軽微タスクと scout / PoC handoff に exact target / owner / due / success criteria を必須化する low-risk wording だけを独立 proposal として再提出する。
observations: 元 proposal は boundary / routing root と docs/runbook wording が混在し、revise / blocked で止まっている。
exact target / owner / due / success criteria の preflight は既存 lesson と performance review でも再発抑制の低リスク策として示されている。
authority / routing root / trust boundary を触らない wording 部分だけなら assisted review の対象にできる。
proposed_changes: light-edit / scout / PoC handoff の前に exact target / owner / due / success criteria を1行で確認する wording を report / runbook に固定する。
handoff preflight の欠落を retry cost の主因として lesson / performance review / premeeting report に反映する。
supervisor-core の権限・routing root・staffing 境界には触れない。
next_step: Run verification before moving to VERIFIED.

review.reason: Low-risk proposal: splits out only the docs/runbook wording portion (exact target / owner / due / success criteria preflight) from the previously blocked boundary proposal. No authority, routing root, trust boundary, or staffing changes. Reversible, no blast radius to production. Board precedent supports this (handoff-guardrail investigation decision). Apply with assisted mode.
notes: Derived from proposal-20260326-supervisor-boundary-preflight which was blocked for boundary impact. This split isolates the safe docs-only portion.
All affected paths are docs/reports only, no config or runtime changes.
Aligns with Board decision-20260326003225-8396497ebc2f (handoff-guardrail investigate) and decision-20260326011451-498a75139cf2.
